item.title: We need more dads like theres!! Delighted for them, sharing in case anyone it can help anyone, I think it's a great response to a trans or non binary child when they come out!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Karen is gonna Karen ...
item.description: To refresh your memory, Amy Cooper, a dog owner walking in Central Park, called the cops and faked an attack because there was a black man in her vicinity. What was he doing? He was bird-watching. You know, that thing people do when they’re super interested in birding. How nefarious!
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: Ice-cream Bean
item.description: From Wikipedia: “Inga edulis has been cultivated as a fruit tree for millennia and is widely sold on the local South American marketplace, mainly for the sweet, succulent pulp surrounding the seeds. The white pulp (aril) is consumed raw as a sweet snack, though it is less nutritious than the seeds. Toxic compounds such as trypsin and chymotrypsin inhibitors contained in the seeds of Inga edulis are destroyed through cooking.”
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: MURMAIDER MURMAIDER MURMAIDER!
item.description: EDIT: Thanks to @IRateYourChristmasSelfies for finding the sauce! Its @Bonnymama7 on twitter. EDIT: Thanks for the updates everyone ! Remember! when you quench your blood thirst, others will seek vengeance on you. And they wont rest until you're dead! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, click here! https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/

item.dc:creator: j22k

item.title: The Ancient Texts: A Phone Clearing Meme Dump pt-10
item.description:
Bienvenue mon amis. Part 10 already, how time flies. You're getting so big, are you excited for grade 5? Anyway, I had the above happen to me this weekend. Making friends in a new city. Always nerve-racking.
We are still in mid-2019 and it is still wild to me how many Vax memes I have from that period. It's like we all had a feeling something was coming.
The ship is now also on fire.
Started doing this a few years ago and the double takes alone are worth it.
I want to feel like I'm cutting calories and my dog always wants them. Cant give him too many tho, lil chonker.
These were the ingredients to make the spookiest little girls. But after ingredient X was added shit really took a turn.
She leyft meh rosyas buyhhh the stayirsssss
Anxiety has been giving me stomach issues lately. Just makes me more anxious!
Ever smash one of these bad boys? Satisfying and dangerous, don't do it.
The original design for the standard USB port was double sided like the USB-C but was decided against to save money.
Stay hydrated
It's a good list.
Think about doing this every time I start a new character but chicken out.
I don't get the appeal but you do you. No judgement.
Had a couple moments of this at the party I went to. Just gotta savour it.
Ban plastic bags. There I said it.
Thank you for coming with me on this journey. Please return carts to the cart return upon leaving. And remember, dont let the bastards grind you down.
item.dc:creator: WaywardJester

item.title: My 15th Favorite Annette and Todd
item.description: The story still gets me every time. I agree with later posters in this series. I have no idea why this hasn't been picked up by TV execs. I would watch the heck outta this.
